scripts.codegen: node ../bin/capnwasm.mjs gen users.capnp -o src/playground/users.capnp.gen.mjs && node ../bin/capnwasm.mjs gen chat.capnp -o src/chat/chat.capnp.gen.mjs
scripts.prepare: cp ../dist/capnp.slim.wasm public/ && cp ../js/inspect.mjs public/inspect.js && pnpm run codegen && node scripts/generate-fixtures.mjs
